_comment: Eligibility overlay keyed by GCFB location id. This data is NOT reliably in the GCFB source, so it is curated here. The SAFE DEFAULT is open-to-all: a location with no entry (or with residentsOf omitted) is treated as serving everyone. Only add a residentsOf restriction after confirming it — a false restriction can wrongly turn people away from food they qualify for. residentsOf powers the 'city you reside in' filter; note is free-text shown in the eligibility callout.
_provenance: The entries below are transcribed from residency language that appears verbatim in the GCFB source hours comments (visible in each location's Notes). Verify against the facility before relying on them; availability changes.

216.note: Restricted service area — Lakewood residents only; served once a month.

259.note: Restricted to residents of Villa Mercede Apartments (1331 West 70th St) and Northridge Commons (10462 Detroit Ave.).
